channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: Snarled airports and frozen funding test the new DHS secretary
item.description: "As the US airport systems face chaos and funding for the Department of Homeland Security hangs in the balance, the new DHS secretary has their work cut out. Read more about the challenges they're up against in this article from The Economist: https://www.economist.com/united-states/2026/03/26/snarled-airports-and-frozen-funding-test-the-new-dhs-secretary"
